name: timepoint-obsidian-plugin
description: A local-first daily timeline plugin for Obsidian.

scripts.format: prettier --write src tests scripts docs .github README.md CHANGELOG.md SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md styles.css manifest.json versions.json package.json esbuild.config.mjs eslint.config.mts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src tests scripts docs .github README.md CHANGELOG.md SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md styles.css manifest.json versions.json package.json esbuild.config.mjs eslint.config.mts
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run audit:high
